since_last: 44% of 84 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.20%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 44% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.72% · BTC -1.27% · Gold -0.44% · Nasdaq100 +1.26%. 44% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.20%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.20%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -2.96%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at -6.07%
cards.body: Leaders: NOW +2.56%, SAP +2.13%, CRM +2.02%, CRWD +1.78%, AMZN +1.77%. Laggards: MU -6.07%, LRCX -5.41%, AMAT -5.35%, ZBRA -5.23%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.80% at $157.54
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.80% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
